# Omotra — UK Web Design Agency

> Omotra builds fast, custom websites for UK small and medium businesses.
> Founded by Jonathan Hall. Based in the UK.
> Pricing starts from £500. Website: https://omotra.com

## Services
- Brochure websites: £500–£2,995 one-time build
- Web applications: custom pricing
- E-commerce stores: custom pricing
- Monthly maintenance and support: £49–£249/month

## Key Pages
- Services and pricing: https://omotra.com/services
- Our process: https://omotra.com/process
- Portfolio and case studies: https://omotra.com/work
- About the founder: https://omotra.com/about
- Contact: https://omotra.com/contact
- Blog: https://omotra.com/blog

## Tech Stack
React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Supabase, Vercel
